div1.entryFree: Prune, vb. to trim; applied to trees, == to lop superfluous branches: Err. II, 2, 181. As II, 3, 63. To persons, == to dress up: or spend a minute's time in --ing me, LLL IV, 3, 183. To birds, == to pick out damaged feathers and arrange the plumage with the bill: which makes him p. himself and bristle up the crest of youth, H4A I, 1, 98. his royal bird -- s the immortal wing, Cymb. V, 4, 118.
